mapper.select:
SELECT tar.tag_name FROM kol_category_attribute_relation car INNER JOIN kol_attribute ka ON car.attribute_category_id = ka.id INNER JOIN kol_attribute ka2 ON ka2.attribute_name = SUBSTRING_INDEX(ka.attribute_name_path, '|', 1) INNER JOIN kol_tag_attribute_relation tar ON tar.attribute_id = ka2.id left join kol_tags atr on tar.tag_id = atr.id AND atr.platform_type = #{platformType} WHERE atr.is_active =1 and atr.is_delete =0 and car.category_id IN
#{categoryId}

SELECT DISTINCT tag_name FROM ${searchModel.tempTableName} b WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM
tiktok_celebrity_tags
ig_celebrity_tags
youtube_celebrity_tags
as cel_tags WHERE cel_tags.tag_name = b.tag_name AND cel_tags.country = #{searchModel.countryCode} )

SELECT
author_id as unique_id
account as unique_id
FROM
tiktok_celebrity_tags
ig_celebrity_tags
youtube_celebrity_tags
as cel_tags join ${searchModel.tempTableName} b on cel_tags.tag_name = b.tag_name
and cel_tags.country = #{searchModel.countryCode}

SELECT DISTINCT tag_name FROM
tiktok_celebrity_tags
ig_celebrity_tags
youtube_celebrity_tags
as cel_tags join ${searchModel.tempTableName} b on
cel_tags.authorId = b.unique_id
cel_tags.account = b.unique_id
